## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New or changed role (`references/roles/`)
- [ ] Pipeline change (`references/pipelines/`)
- [ ] Reference / docs
- [ ] Script (`bin/`) or eval harness
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `bin/eval-role.sh --all` passes locally
- [ ] Catalogs updated if role count or list changed (`SKILL.md`, `references/role-matrix.md`)
- [ ] `skills-manifest.json` updated if skills changed
- [ ] Internal markdown links resolve
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased* (with SemVer impact)
